name: Fresh Herb and Garlic Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup packed fresh herb leaves (e.g., parsley, basil, thyme, oregano, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the garlic, herbs, butter, salt, pepper, and cayenne to taste. Process until smooth.
- Alternatively, finely chop together the garlic and herbs. Then, in a bowl, mix with the butter, salt, pepper, and cayenne.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. Cut the bread into slices, each approximately 1 1/2 inches thick along the entire length of the loaf.
4. Spread each side of a slice with the butter mixture.
5. Wrap the loaf in aluminum foil and bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until heated through.
6. Unwrap the bread and bake for an additional 5 minutes to brown the top.
7. Serve the bread warm.
Yield: 4 servings
